'''hogalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bye|bye]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bye|bye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hogalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hogalithi|hogalithi]] || [[word:hogaliji|hogaliji]] || [[word:hogalishi|hogalishi]] || [[word:hogaliki|hogaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hogaluthuthu|hogaluthuthu]] || [[word:hogalujuju|hogalujuju]] || [[word:hogalushushu|hogalushushu]] || [[word:hogalukuku|hogalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hogaluthu|hogaluthu]] || [[word:hogaluju|hogaluju]] || [[word:hogalushu|hogalushu]] || [[word:hogaluku|hogaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hogalufthuf|hogalufthuf]] || [[word:hogalufjuf|hogalufjuf]] || [[word:hogalufshuf|hogalufshuf]] || [[word:hogalufkuf|hogalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hogalethe|hogalethe]] || [[word:hogaleje|hogaleje]] || [[word:hogaleshe|hogaleshe]] || [[word:hogaleke|hogaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hogalothotho|hogalothotho]] || [[word:hogalojojo|hogalojojo]] || [[word:hogaloshosho|hogaloshosho]] || [[word:hogalokoko|hogalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hogalotho|hogalotho]] || [[word:hogalojo|hogalojo]] || [[word:hogalosho|hogalosho]] || [[word:hogaloko|hogaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hogalofthof|hogalofthof]] || [[word:hogalofjof|hogalofjof]] || [[word:hogalofshof|hogalofshof]] || [[word:hogalofkof|hogalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfthÃŸf|hogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfjÃŸf|hogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfshÃŸf|hogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfkÃŸf|hogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hogalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hogalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hogalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hogalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfthÃŸf|hogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfjÃŸf|hogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfshÃŸf|hogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfkÃŸf|hogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfthÃŸf|hogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfjÃŸf|hogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfshÃŸf|hogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hogalÃŸfkÃŸf|hogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hogalÃḊthÃḊ|hogalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hogalÃḊjÃḊ|hogalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hogalÃḊshÃḊ|hogalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hogalÃḊkÃḊ|hogalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hogalathatha|hogalathatha]] || [[word:hogalajaja|hogalajaja]] || [[word:hogalashasha|hogalashasha]] || [[word:hogalakaka|hogalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hogalatha|hogalatha]] || [[word:hogalaja|hogalaja]] || [[word:hogalasha|hogalasha]] || [[word:hogalaka|hogalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hogalafthaf|hogalafthaf]] || [[word:hogalafjaf|hogalafjaf]] || [[word:hogalafshaf|hogalafshaf]] || [[word:hogalafkaf|hogalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hogalasha|hogalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hogalshÃḋsha|hogalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hogalrosha|hogalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hogalmusha|hogalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hogalyasha|hogalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohogalnkshÃḋsha|gohogalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohogalnkrosha|gohogalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohogalnkmusha|gohogalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohogalnkyasha|gohogalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hogagalasha|hogagalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hogagalshÃḋsha|hogagalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hogagalrosha|hogagalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hogagalmusha|hogagalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hogagalyasha|hogagalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohogagalnkshÃḋsha|gohogagalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohogagalnkrosha|gohogagalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohogagalnkmusha|gohogagalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohogagalnkyasha|gohogagalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hegÃḊlasha|hegÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hegÃḊlshÃḋsha|hegÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hegÃḊlrosha|hegÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hegÃḊlmusha|hegÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hegÃḊlyasha|hegÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohegÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gohegÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohegÃḊlnkrosha|gohegÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohegÃḊlnkmusha|gohegÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohegÃḊlnkyasha|gohegÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hogfalasha|hogfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hogfalshÃḋsha|hogfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hogfalrosha|hogfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hogfalmusha|hogfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hogfalyasha|hogfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohogfalnkshÃḋsha|gohogfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohogfalnkrosha|gohogfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohogfalnkmusha|gohogfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohogfalnkyasha|gohogfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
